unknownDay.title: Cycle day
unknownDay.description: Log your period start to see your current day and a gentle daily note.

loadError.title: Oops
loadError.description: Couldn’t load the daily text. Please refresh the page.

1.title: Extra gentle
1.description: Slow everything down. Warm drinks, softer movement, fewer expectations. Your body is working hard — let it.

2.title: It’s easing
2.description: Still tender, but lighter. Move a little if it feels good. No rush — just a small return to yourself.

3.title: Energy rising
3.description: Clarity starts peeking through. You may feel more grounded. Take one simple action, that’s enough.

4.title: Back online
4.description: Strength is coming back. Not full speed yet — but you’re clearly shifting forward.

5.title: Fresh start
5.description: This is your reset window. Planning feels easier. Try something new today.

6.title: Momentum building
6.description: Ideas connect faster. Say yes to movement, learning, small risks.

7.title: Focused
7.description: You can structure chaos today. Good time to decide things.

8.title: Clear & capable
8.description: Conversations flow better. Reach out, pitch, share.

9.title: Curious mode
9.description: Explore. Brain is sharp. Absorb, test, iterate.

10.title: High output
10.description: You can handle more. Just don’t overload yourself because you can.

11.title: Confident energy
11.description: Speak up. Ask for what you want.

12.title: Magnetic
12.description: Connection feels natural. Social energy is high.

13.title: Peak power
13.description: Strong body, sharp mind. Use it intentionally.

14.title: Full bloom
14.description: Maximum clarity. Big decisions are welcome here.

15.title: Shift begins
15.description: Energy turns inward. Focus on execution, not expansion.

16.title: Steady mode
16.description: Less sparkle, more depth. Good for finishing tasks.

17.title: Refine & edit
17.description: You’ll notice what’s off. Improve, adjust.

19.title: Selective
19.description: Choose fewer things. Say no more easily.

21.title: Inner critic awake
21.description: Be careful — not everything is wrong. You’re just more perceptive.

23.title: Slow down
23.description: Your body asks for gentleness again.

24.title: Soft edges
24.description: More rest, warmer food, quieter evenings.

26.title: Almost there
26.description: You may feel stretched. Keep the schedule light.

28.title: Release coming
28.description: Close loops. Prepare space for reset.

29plus.title: Still waiting
29plus.description: Cycles aren’t clocks. A few days of variation is completely normal. Stay gentle and give your body space.
